violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Walk-in cooler shelves in need of repair--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Seals of walk in cooler found in need of repair

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. -Tubs were used for cleaning of plates and utensils.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Dish machine not operation at time of inspection

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors of front walk-in cooler and freezer in need of cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Some broken tiles found in kitchen area -Some broken tiles by dish area -Bare concrete by ice machine

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Lights in back storage room are not shielded.
